positive: A whimsical, stylized design featuring a cluster of floating celestial elements: a crescent moon, a grouping of five stars of varying sizes, and three abstract, ethereal nebula wisps. The elements should be arranged in a balanced, symmetrical composition, emanating from a central point. Use a minimalist and sophisticated art deco style with thick, clean silhouettes and defined outlines. The color palette must be restricted to deep indigo blue, metallic gold accents, and creamy off-white, creating high contrast. The overall aesthetic should be suitable for a vintage fashion print, designed with clean negative space around the main elements, centered on a solid background.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low detail, messy, grunge, realistic photography, logos, signatures, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise
